name: ExtensionCapabilityStatement_Identifier
title: R5: Additional identifier for the CapabilityStatement (business identifier) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CapabilityStatement.identifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CapabilityStatement.identifier` 0..* `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CapabilityStatement.identifier` 0..* `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CapabilityStatement.identifier` has a context of CapabilityStatement based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CapabilityStatement`.
Element `CapabilityStatement.identifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional identifier for the CapabilityStatement (business identifier) (new)
element.comment:
Element `CapabilityStatement.identifier` has a context of CapabilityStatement based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CapabilityStatement`.
Element `CapabilityStatement.identifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Additional identifier for the CapabilityStatement (business identifier)
element.definition: A formal identifier that is used to identify this CapabilityStatement when it is represented in other formats, or referenced in a specification, model, design or an instance.
